title: Fixing WASM binding errors in aivo-compute
currentGoal: Fix test compilation errors by properly separating WASM exports from internal helper functions
completedWork: Fixed all warnings in aivo-compute lib.rs
Added #[wasm_bindgen(skip)] to some functions but still encountering WASM compatibility issues
nextStep: Split CorrelationAnalyzer impl into regular (helpers) and #[wasm_bindgen] (public API) blocks
notes: The core issue: #[wasm_bindgen] on impl block forces all pub methods to be WASM-compatible. Need to move WASM methods to separate impl block and keep helpers in regular impl.
